record.field:
Hi Admin,

We hope this email finds you well. We are delighted to inform you that user has made some new subscription purchase.

Here are the details of user's subscription:

Subscription Details:

Plan Type:

●

Protocol:

●

Subscription Period: to

●

Subscription Amount:

Thanks & Regards,
Team Zeeve

Unsubscription request received

has requested to cancel their Subscription. Please review the request and take necessary action.

Request Details

●

Subscription:

●

Type:

●

Plan/Protocol: /

●

Customer Email:

●

Requested On:

Node ID:

●

Reason / Notes:

View Record

Please follow up with the customer to confirm the request and complete the off-boarding steps.

Thanks & Regards,
Team Zeeve

You have Subscribed: {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('protocol_name')) or '' }} - {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('node_type')) or '' }}

Hi

Thank you for choosing Zeeve to power your blockchain infrastructure.

We're excited to be part of your journey, and our team is here to ensure you get the most out of your " " subscription.

Here are the details of your subscription:

Subscription Details:

●

Plan Type:

●

Protocol:

●

Subscription Period: to

●

Subscription Amount: USD

Node Status:

●

Current Status: Provisioning (We will email you once the node is up and running)

●

ETA:

Access & Management:

You can access and manage your anytime through the Zeeve Dashboard. Our goal is to make your experience smooth and efficient. Should you have any questions, need support, or want to upgrade your plan, feel free to contact our team at support@zeeve.io or chat with us directly through the dashboard.

Schedule a Call

Thank you once again for trusting Zeeve as your infrastructure partner.

Warm regards,
Yuvraj Singh Negi
Lead, Customer Success

Follow us at

@ 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved

Provisioning Done: {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('protocol_name')) or '' }} - {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('node_type')) or '' }}

Hi ,

Thank you for choosing Zeeve to power your blockchain infrastructure.

The provisioning of your has been completed.

Now the node is syncing to the latest block. Once the syncing is complete, you would be able to use the node fully.

Node Status:

●

Current Status: Syncing (We will email you once the node is up and running)

●

ETA:

Access & Management:

You can access and manage your anytime through the Zeeve Dashboard. Our goal is to make your experience smooth and efficient. Should you have any questions, need support, or want to upgrade your plan, feel free to contact our team at support@zeeve.io or chat with us directly through the dashboard.

Schedule a Call

Thank you once again for trusting Zeeve as your infrastructure partner.

Warm regards,
Yuvraj Singh Negi
Lead, Customer Success

Follow us at

@ 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved

Your Node is ready: {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('protocol_name')) or '' }} - {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('node_type')) or '' }}

Hi

Thank you for choosing Zeeve to power your blockchain infrastructure.

Your is up and running. Now you can use the node for your RPC calls.

Node Status:

●

Current Status: Ready

●

HTTPS Endpoint: You can access the endpoint from the Zeeve dashboard

●

WSS Endpoint: You can access the endpoint from the Zeeve dashboard

Access & Management:

You can access and manage your anytime through the Zeeve Dashboard. Our goal is to make your experience smooth and efficient. Should you have any questions, need support, or want to upgrade your plan, feel free to contact our team at support@zeeve.io or chat with us directly through the dashboard.

Schedule a Call

Thank you once again for trusting Zeeve as your infrastructure partner.

Warm regards,
Yuvraj Singh Negi
Lead, Customer Success

Follow us at

{{ ctx.get('payment_category_label') or 'Subscription Payment' }} - Subscription payment received for {{ object.name }}

Hi Admin,

A payment has been captured for the subscription . Here are the key details to help you track billing and provisioning.

Customer
Protocol
Plan
Payment Amount
Next Billing
Payment Type
Invoice
View Invoice

Keep an eye on the dashboard for provisioning updates and reach out to the customer if any manual steps are pending.

Regards,
The Zeeve Team
Cancelled Subscription - {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('Plan_Name')) or ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('plan_name')) or '' }}

Zeeve Subscription Cancelled Template

Subscription Quantity Updated Subscription Cancelled

Dear ,
This is a quick confirmation that we have updated your subscription seats for . Your plan now includes active seat(s) (previously ). The subscription itself remains active, and billing from the next cycle will reflect this adjusted quantity. Your subscription for has now been cancelled. We hope this email finds you well. We are reaching out to confirm that we have received your recent request to cancel your subscription to the . As per your request, your subscription to the has been successfully cancelled, effective immediately. This means that you will no longer have access to the features and benefits associated with this plan.

Here is a summary of your updated subscription: As promised, here are the details of your subscription:
Subscription ID:
Previous Quantity:
Current Quantity:
Protocol:
Plan:
:  
Date of Cancellation:
Status:

Need to add seats back or have questions about this adjustment? Reply to this email or reach us anytime at . We're happy to help keep your subscription aligned with your workload. We value your feedback and would greatly appreciate it if you could spare a few moments to share your reasons for cancelling your subscription. Your insights will aid us in improving our services and meeting the needs of our customers more effectively. You can share your feedback by replying to this email or by visiting our website's feedback page at Zeeve.

If you have any questions or concerns about your subscription, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. Our customer support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
Zeeve Inc, 395 Santa Monica, Pl Unit 308, Santa Monica, CA 90401, United States
|

Cancelled Subscription By - {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('buyer_email_id')) or ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('buyerEmail')) or 'Customer' }}

Subscription Quantity Updated Subscription Cancelled

Dear Admin,
The customer has reduced the seats on subscription from to . The subscription remains active, but future invoices should reflect this new quantity. We hope this email finds you well. We regret to inform you that the subscription for by user has been cancelled.

Updated subscription details: Here are the details of the subscription:
User email:
Subscription ID:
Previous Quantity:
Current Quantity:
Protocol:
Plan:
:  
Date of Cancellation:
Status:

We understand that this may come as a disappointment, and we would appreciate it if you could update the user's account status accordingly.
Thank you for your understanding and cooperation throughout this process. We greatly appreciate your continued support.

If you have any questions or concerns about your subscription, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. Our customer support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
Zeeve Inc, 395 Santa Monica, Pl Unit 308, Santa Monica, CA 90401, United States
|
Your subscription is active: {{ (ctx.get('subscription_ctx') or {}).get('plan_name') or object.sub_plan_id.name or 'Subscription' }}

Hi ,

Thank you for choosing Zeeve to power your infrastructure.

Your subscription is now active. You can start managing your services and accessing Zeeve resources immediately.

Subscription Details:

●

Subscription Reference:

●

Plan Name:

●

Protocol:

●

Plan Type:

●

Subscription Period: to

●

Next Renewal Date:

●

Plan Price:

Subscription Status:

●

Current Status:

Next Steps & Resources:

●

Manage Your Subscription: Monitor usage, invoices, and resources in the Zeeve dashboard.
👉 Zeeve Dashboard

●

Developer Documentation: Explore guides, best practices, and API references.
👉 Docs

●

Need Help? Our team is here for you. Reach out at or schedule a call.
👉 Talk to an Expert

We appreciate your trust in Zeeve and look forward to supporting your growth.

Best regards,


Zeeve Team

Follow us at

@ 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved
Validator - Node Staking & Restake Configuration Admin Alert

{{ (ctx.get('action_type') or 'Node').capitalize() }} Configuration - {{ (ctx.get('validator_ctx') or {}).get('protocol_name') or 'Protocol' }} - {{ (ctx.get('validator_ctx') or {}).get('status') or 'Update' }}

Hi Admin,

We are pleased to inform you that a validator node has been successfully staked on the blockchain network. We would like to notify you that there was an issue while attempting to stake a validator node. We are pleased to inform you that automatic restake has been successfully enabled for the validator. We would like to notify you that there was an issue while attempting to enable automatic restake. We are pleased to inform you that validator information has been successfully updated in the blockchain network. We would like to notify you that there was an issue while updating the validator information.

Here are the details of the node staking operation: Here are the details of the restake configuration: Here are the details of the validator update:

Node Staking Details: Restake Configuration: Validator Details:

●

Status: SUCCESSFAILED

●

Protocol:

●

Node ID:

●

Validator Address:

●

Subscription ID:

●

Customer:

●

Customer Email:

●

Timestamp:

●

:

Error Details:

Thanks & Regards,
Team Zeeve

Follow us at

@ 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved
